text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Everyone doing all right? No sizing issues or anything?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah, um, just a minute, please! Can't... tie the sash!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa there, Urara! Stay still for just a little longer! We're almost
done!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haah ha ha ha! Gaze upon me, robed in splendor! Such beauty cannot
be of this realm—I am as a rose sent from heaven itself!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My very person is a cause for celebration, a herald of the new year!
Witness! For I hereby declare the founding of the New Overlord
Kingdom!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm all dressed up too! Oh hey, mine's different from Oppy's!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Given the special occasion, I thought I'd ask the designer to
tailor the pieces to match each of you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That's our Tazuna! Always paying attention to detail! Now, how fare
the other two?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And here I am! The size, the fit, it's just perfect!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the fortune coming already! Auspicious and ostentatious! I
think I could take a 3,000-meter over turf with ease!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Umm, Director? It's so gorgeous, I can't help but feel like it's wasted
on me...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Nonsense! When our students challenge their limits, it is our duty to
support them in any way we can!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Karuta may seem like an elegant game, but in truth it is fierce! Proper
dress requires the same material used in racewear!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
As you will be representing our academy, we want you competing at
full strength!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: D-Director... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(I'm sure the old me would've felt nothing but pressure hearing those
words... but now...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Basically, a taker needs acceleration, fast reflexes, the ability to
make snap judgments, and speed.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So, um... since you excel in the final leg of a race, I think you would
be best for the role.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's it? When you suddenly requested a change of command, I
thought you were planning a rebellious takeover scene!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what? I-I would never do that! A-also, I was thinking about
you two, and...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
In karuta, you also need someone to "guard" and "screen"—get in the
opponent's way, basically.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You guard the card when it's on your side, and when it's on their side,
you set a screen so your teammate has a clear path to it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
S-so I was thinking, Fukukitaru, you could focus on the opponent and
tell Urara how to move accordingly...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense. My voice is louder, and I bet Urara would stick to
her mark like glue!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And if that slows down our opponents even a little, Opera O can
make a run for it—and sh-she'd never lose!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah, erm, sorry, I know coming from me it... i-it might sound stupid,
but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No, not at all! Who knew karuta had so much strategic depth to
it—color me surprised!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You know, I'm starting to get excited! Okay then, let's swap roles and
give it a go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh? What's the matter, Doto? Something on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no! I-it's just, wearing these robes suddenly makes the tournament
feel so much more real...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh, I think you're right! Before a race, it's once you put on your
racewear that the nerves really start to kick in!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now all that's left for us to do is put your strategy to the test.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hey folks, really appreciate you lending us a hand!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't mention it. You guys are gonna compete in the tournament,
right? That's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: We're all rooting for ya—you guys got this!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aw, well thank you. Okay, so, when the poem starts, if you could run
over to this side of the field...

text_block_list.name: Reciter App
text_block_list.text: Umamusume, eternal...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-O-Opera O! Our side, left, five-one!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Already there!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urara, time to guard! Spread out your arms and don't let them past!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Got it! Just like this!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Aha! Mine for the taking!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Uhh... um, did we just...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A truly ideal, truly elegant performance! Perfect, I might even venture
to call it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey! My guard was perfect too, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You know, I had my doubts at first, but we absolutely crushed it. I
don't think it gets any better than that!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And it's all thanks to Doto studying up on karuta for us. Isn't that
right, "Commander" Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eeep! I-I didn't do that much! B-but, if I helped even a little bit,
th-then I'm glad!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: We worked super hard, so I know we're gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
(She's not wrong... Practice is going well, so maybe, just maybe... I
thought it'd be totally out of our reach, but...)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
W-well, there are no guarantees! But win or lose, let's go into it ready
to grab ourselves a bag of New Year's fortune!

text_block_list.name: The Three
text_block_list.text: Yeah!
